record_types.name: Deepstall

fields.name: Path_Lat
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Final heading start point, latitude.

fields.name: Path_Lon
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Final heading start point, longitude.

fields.name: Expected_Travel_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance the aircraft expects to travel during the deepstall.

fields.name: Cross_Track_Error
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Deepstall cross track error (only valid when in
DEEPSTALL_STAGE_LAND).
